Dear Hiring Team,

I currently develop core eye-tracking features using C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics. I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time.
